song_name: Gloria Gaynor - I Will Survive - Miley Cyrus - Flowers
version_description: Mash Up Version of I Will Survive and Flowers.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]Am[/ch] [ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]E7[/ch]


[Verse 1]
[tab]   [ch]Am[/ch]                           [ch]Dm[/ch]
At first I was afraid, I was petrified[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]G[/ch]                              [ch]C[/ch]
I kept thinkin' I could never live without you by my side[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]F[/ch]                                [ch]B7[/ch]
But then I spent so many nights just thinking how you've done me wrong[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]E[/ch]                [ch]E7[/ch]
I grew strong, I learned how to get along...[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]Dm[/ch]
And so you're back from outer space[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]                                      [ch]C[/ch]
I just walked in to find you here without that look upon your face,[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]F[/ch]                                   [ch]B7[/ch]
I should have changed my fuckin' lock, I would've made you leave your key-[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]E[/ch]                                  [ch]E7[/ch]
If I'd have known for just one second you'd be back to bother me.[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]Dm[/ch]
Oh now go, walk out the door,[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]C[/ch]
Just turn around now, you're not welcome anymore.[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F[/ch]                         [ch]B7[/ch]
Weren't you the one who tried to break me with desire?[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]E[/ch]                          [ch]E7[/ch]
Did you think I'd crumble? Did you think I'd lay down and die?[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]Dm[/ch]
Oh not I, I will survive,[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]                              [ch]C[/ch]
Yeah, as long as I know how to love, I know I'll be alive.[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F[/ch]                             [ch]B7[/ch]
I've got all my life to live, I've got all my love to give[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]E[/ch]                [ch]E7[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]
I will survive, I will survive, Yeah, yeah...[/tab]


[Break]
[ch]Am[/ch] [ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]E7[/ch]

[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]Dm[/ch]
We were good, we were gold[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]
Kind of dream that can't be sold[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]Dm[/ch]
We were right 'til we weren't[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]
Built a home and watched it burn[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]                        [ch]Dm[/ch]
Mmm, I didn't wanna leave you, I didn't wanna lie[/tab]
[tab] [ch]E7[/ch]
Started to cry but then remembered, I[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]Dm[/ch]
I can buy myself flowers[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]C/B[/ch]
 Write my name in the sand[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                  [ch]Dm[/ch]
 Talk to myself for hours[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                           [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]C/B[/ch]
 Say things you don't understand[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]Dm[/ch]
 I can take myself dancing[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]C/B[/ch]
 And I can hold my own hand[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]              [ch]E7[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]
Yeah, I can love me better than you can[/tab]


[Post-Chorus]
[tab]                    [ch]Dm[/ch]
Can love me better, I can love me better, baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]C/B[/ch]
 Can love me better, I can love me better, baby[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]Dm[/ch]
Paint my nails, cherry red[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
Match the roses that you left[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]Dm[/ch]
No remorse, no regret[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
I forgive every word you said[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]                        [ch]Dm[/ch]
Mmm, I didn't wanna leave you, I didn't wanna lie[/tab]
[tab] [ch]E7[/ch]
Started to cry but then remembered, I[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]Dm[/ch]
Oh now go, walk out the door,[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]C[/ch]
Just turn around now, you're not welcome anymore.[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F[/ch]                         [ch]B7[/ch]
Weren't you the one who tried to break me with desire?[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]E[/ch]                          [ch]E7[/ch]
Did you think I'd crumble? Did you think I'd lay down and die?[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]Dm[/ch]
Oh not I, I will survive,[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]                              [ch]C[/ch]
Yeah, as long as I know how to love, I know I'll be alive.[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F[/ch]                             [ch]B7[/ch]
I've got all my life to live, I've got all my love to give[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]E[/ch]                [ch]E7[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]
I will survive, I will survive, Yeah, yeah...[/tab]


[Post-Chorus]
[tab]                    [ch]Dm[/ch]
Can love me better, I can love me better, baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]C/B[/ch]
 Can love me better, I can love me better, baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                   [ch]Dm[/ch]
 Can love me better, I can love me better, baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]C[/ch]
 Can love me better, I[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                              [ch]Dm[/ch]
I didn't wanna leave you, baby, I didn't wanna fight[/tab]
[tab] [ch]E7[/ch]
Started to cry but then remembered I[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]Dm[/ch]
I can buy myself flowers (Uh-uh)[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]C/B[/ch]
 Write my name in the sand[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                  [ch]Dm[/ch]
 Talk to myself for hours (Yeah-eah)[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                           [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]C/B[/ch]
 Say things you don't understand[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]Dm[/ch]
 I can take myself dancing (Yeah-eah)[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]C/B[/ch]
 And I can hold my own hand[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]              [ch]E7[/ch]
Yeah, I can love me better than[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]              [ch]E7[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]
Yeah, I can love me better than you can[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]E[/ch]                [ch]E7[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]
I will survive, I will survive, Yeah, yeah...[/tab]


[Outro]
[ch]Am[/ch] [ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]E7[/ch]
